name: Okta Password Reset or Unlock Attempt Spike (24 hours)
description: Detects repeated Okta password-reset or account-unlock attempts that can indicate account recovery abuse.
query: SELECT COALESCE(l.actor_id, l.actor_type, 'unknown') AS id, COALESCE(actor.login, actor.email, l.actor_id, l.actor_type, 'unknown') AS actor_name, COUNT(*) AS reset_unlock_events, MAX(l.published) AS last_event FROM okta_system_logs l LEFT JOIN okta_users actor ON actor.id = l.actor_id WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(l.event_type, '')) IN ('system.email.account_unlock.sent_message', 'system.email.password_reset.sent_message', 'system.sms.send_account_unlock_message', 'system.sms.send_password_reset_message', 'system.voice.send_account_unlock_call', 'system.voice.send_password_reset_call', 'user.account.unlock_token') AND l.published >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY COALESCE(l.actor_id, l.actor_type, 'unknown'), COALESCE(actor.login, actor.email, l.actor_id, l.actor_type, 'unknown') HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5
remediation: Investigate actors driving repeated account recovery events, validate user intent, and enforce stronger account recovery controls and adaptive MFA.
